channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Three Red Cross volunteers die after contracting Ebola during humanitarian work in DR Congo
item.description: Three volunteers from the Red Cross in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DR Congo) have died after reportedly contracting Ebola while carrying out humanitarian work in the northeastern province of Itu...

item.title: Hannah Murray discusses mental health crisis following involvement with a wellness group and subsequent hospitalisation
item.description: Former Skins and Game of Thrones actress Hannah Murray has spoken candidly about a severe mental health crisis that resulted in her hospitalisation and a later diagnosis of bipolar disorder. In a rece...

item.title: Davido begins construction of N8 billion family mansion in Eko Atlantic, Lagos
item.description: Popular Nigerian music star David Adeleke, widely known as Davido, has started the construction of a luxury family mansion in Lagos State, specifically within the high-end Eko Atlantic City. According...

item.title: Transgender Athlete AB Hernandez Qualifies for California State Track Meet in Multiple Events
item.description: Transgender athlete AB Hernandez from Jurupa Valley High School continued to make headlines at the 2026 CIF Southern Section Track & Field Masters Meet in Moorpark, California. On May 23, 2026, Hernan...

item.title: South African regulators intensify efforts to combat substandard and falsified medicines
item.description: The article explores the growing threat of substandard and falsified medicines in South Africa and the efforts by regulators to address the issue. It highlights how patients, particularly those seekin...

item.title: Cooling mattresses, sheets and pillows designed to improve sleep comfort during warmer weather
item.description: The article highlights a range of cooling bedding products intended to help people sleep more comfortably as temperatures rise during spring and summer. It explains that overheating at night and night...

item.title: Legal Community Seeks Clarity After Lawyer Arrested During Court Session

item.title: Twisha Sharma cremated in Bhopal as investigation continues after second AIIMS postmortem
item.description: The last rites of former model and actor Twisha Sharma were conducted on Sunday evening at Bhadbhada Ghat in Bhopal after a second postmortem examination was carried out by a four-member medical team ...

item.title: Halifax police search for missing newborn after woman found in life-threatening condition
item.description: Halifax Regional Police have launched an urgent search for a missing newborn baby after a woman was discovered in hospital in life-threatening condition, appearing to have recently given birth. Accord...

item.title: Bordeaux retain Champions Cup title with dominant win over Leinster as Bielle-Biarrey stars with two tries
item.description: Bordeaux secured back-to-back European Champions Cup titles after delivering a commanding 41-19 victory over Leinster in the final on Saturday, extending French dominance in the competition for a sixt...

item.title: Johanna Matz, Beloved Star of 1950s Austrian Cinema, Dies at 93
item.description: Johanna Matz (1932–2025) was a prominent figure in German-language cinema during the 1950s, widely remembered for her radiant presence and “girl next door” appeal. Trained as a dancer at Vienna’s pres...

item.title: Soundtrack details revealed for Apple TV+ series ‘Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed’
item.description: Apple TV+ has launched its new dark comedy series ‘Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed’, created by David J. Rosen and starring Tatiana Maslany and Jake Johnson. The series follows Paula Saunders, a divorced ...

item.title: Strong buyer competition drives multi-million dollar sales in Narrabundah’s family home market
item.description: Narrabundah’s property market in Canberra’s Inner South continues to show strong momentum, with limited housing stock and sustained buyer demand pushing prices higher for well-located family homes. Re...

item.title: Kano State includes inmates, HIV and hypertensive patients in expanded health insurance scheme
item.description: The Kano State Contributory Healthcare Management Agency (KSCHMA) has expanded its health insurance coverage to include vulnerable groups such as inmates in correctional centres, people living with HI...

item.title: Maggie Smith’s Early Stage Role in the 1960 Play 'Strip the Willow'
item.description: In 1960, a 25-year-old Maggie Smith appeared in the stage production “Strip the Willow,” a play that would later be seen as an important early milestone in her rise to international fame. The work was...

item.title: Miley Cyrus honoured with star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame during emotional ceremony
item.description: Miley Cyrus was awarded a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame during a ceremony held on 22 May 2026 in Los Angeles. The singer, who became the 2,845th person to receive the honour, was accompanied by a...
